transcript: It's not going to be a big achievement for you today, but this pressure system is going to continue to push in the occasional snow shower here and there. I will say this morning, Lebanon, New Jersey will come to an inch of snow. It's possible to do it again tomorrow. Tomorrow, it will be colder and blustery. Winds gusting in time, 30 miles an hour, maybe stronger than that. 29 will feel like 10 to maybe 20 degrees or so in fact from that wind. And then inches get started 29 from tomorrow to 27 on friday to 20 for your eye on saturday
